# ascii-banner

> Generate FIGlet ASCII banners, terminal colors, source-code comments, SVG output, and animated GIF/WebP/MP4/WebM media from one CLI.

Website: https://ascii-banner.com/
Repository: https://github.com/nvk/ascii-banner
Package: https://pypi.org/project/ascii-banner/
Homebrew: https://github.com/nvk/homebrew-tap/blob/main/Formula/ascii-banner.rb

## Documentation

- Home: https://ascii-banner.com/
  Overview, install snippets, hero animation, and generated media examples.
- Full guide: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/
  Comprehensive guide to input, fonts, colors, layout, borders, comments, SVG output, animations, media export, recipes, and flags.
- Animation gallery: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/#animation-gallery
  Every supported animation as generated GIF examples for LLM-WIKI and Bitcoin.
- Static examples: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/#static-gallery
  Terminal output examples for fonts, colors, borders, layout, and comments.
- Font gallery: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/#font-gallery
  All bundled FIGlet fonts with tags, size, legibility, preview, and command.
- Flag reference: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/#flag-reference
  CLI options, subcommands, environment behavior, and previewable command cards.
- Troubleshooting: https://ascii-banner.com/docs/#troubleshooting
  Common terminal color, media export, SVG, and randomized animation issues.

## Install

Homebrew: `brew install nvk/tap/ascii-banner`

pip: `pip install ascii-banner`

Media extras: `pip install "ascii-banner[media]"`

## Related

- LLM Wiki: https://llm-wiki.net
- Learn to Prompt: https://learntoprompt.org
